Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Emperor]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor can Awaken gravel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor wears a silver chain around his neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor wears white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor is the Aurelian Emperor.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor has invested thousands of goldmarks into The Testament's construction.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor believes no sacrifice is too great to prevent the rise of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor's goal is to serve the Empire and the entire world.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor's trademark attire includes a wide-brimmed hat.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor stated that before the Elders, all men are allies.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor received a dream tablet from an Underlord demanding punishment for Eithan's actions in Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor is drinking wine.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
